name: Franklin Bordeaux
description: A hulking, Frankensteinian monster is what Franklin (Furankurin) appears to be, complete with scars and sewn-up wounds that ravage his face. It does seem though, that beneath his harsh exterior lies a small, caring spot in his character, as Franklin acts as a caregiver to Shizuku, and shows concern of her well-being. He is also composed and respectful, normally breaking up arguments and fights within the organization. He is one of the members of the Phantom Troupe that originated from Meteor Cit

name: Fusatarou Oosawa
description: Fusatarou Oosawa, better known as Boutarou the Pirate, is one of the Abashiri Convicts.

name: Fuuko Kurasaki
description: A "retired" Burst Linker responsible of the wind corner of the four elements. She's Ash Roller "parent", the only person in Accel World he shows respect towards. Before Silver Crow existed she was known as 'The person closest to the sky in accelerated world' gaining the nicknames 'Astro', 'ICBM' and 'Icarus'; she became obsessed with the desire of flying, because of that she was abandoned by most of her friends and her "parent"; she gets the help of her friend and master Black Lotus to reach lev

name: Gang Ryong
description: Disciple of Dokgo Ryong, the Absolute One.

name: Garrod Ran
description: The main character of the series, and a 15-year-old hot-headed boy who is skilled at Mobile Suit operation and espionage. He was originally hired to rescue Tiffa Adill from the Vulture ship Freeden but upon realising his employer only wanted to exploit her later becomes part of its crew. For much of the series, he nurses a fairly obvious crush on Tiffa but does not act, fearing that the Tiffa would be unnerved by his advances, since she was denied most of her childhood. His love for her is what

name: Gennosuke Fujiki
description: Fujiki Gennosuke is a one armed samurai from the Kogan school. Fujiki is very loyal to his master, he is also rumored to be the strongest disciple in Kogan's dojo.

name: Giulio Gandini
nativeName: ジュリオ・ガンディーニ
description: Butler who serves the Scervino family.
searchTerms: ジュリオ・ガンディーニ

name: Hae-Won Tang
description: She once was a second rate fantasy romance novel author. After becoming a hit and run victim while talking to the phone and a what assumes to be a best seller action fantasy novel in her bag that she had analyzed every sentence at. She became into the cruelest villainess from the novel. She is determined to stay alive after getting a second chance in life

name: Hana Nonomura
description: Hana Nonomura is a normal sixteen-year old high school girl from an average income family. Hana's sister boycotted an unavoidable marriage meeting with Takane Saibara, so Hana was forced attend the meeting in her place. Hana likes practical things.

name: Hibiki Kimiya
description: A first-year student at Mitoya High. He always carries a scythe with him. He looks up to Hanadori because he felt he was someone similar and equally eccentric.
mediaTitles: A Destructive God Sits Next to Me
Boku no Tonari ni Ankoku Hakaishin ga Imasu

name: Hikari Kongou
description: Hikari is a top student in the gifted youth program. She is Kanau's younger sister. once she met Taihei she thought of him as "Onii-chan". Hikari has long white hair. She appears to have white eyelashes. She apparently has brown eyes. She usually wears her school's uniform of white with red and sleeves, due to her small physique, the sleeves extend further than her arms but nevertheless leaves them as they are. She wears diamond barrettes in her hair.

name: Himari Arisugawa
description: Himari is a hard-working second year middle school student. She is known to be as fast and light as a "squirrel". Despite being shy, no one can stop her when she talks about her favourite sweets. As the Sweets Doctor, Himari knows everything about sweets and how they effect your body. As Cure Custard she is based off pudding and squirrels.
mediaTitles: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories
searchTerms: HUGtto! Precure ♡ Futari wa Precure All Stars Memories

name: Hime Shiratori
description: Described as an "overwhelmingly idol-like idol", Hime has a sweet and tender personality. She is also a polite and elegant person. Hime is also described as an airy and gentle person, and sometimes shows a naturally absent-minded side of herself. (Source: Aikatsu Stars! Wiki)

name: Himeka Saiki
description: __Type:__ Gifted Weirdo __Occupation:__ Singer / First-Year High School Student __Debut:__ Chapter 150 **Girlfriend No. 026** She is a transfer student and a gifted singer who desperately wants to be seen as abnormal. Kiki has been labelled a genius her entire life, to the point where it no longer makes her happy. She attempts to stand out by acting abnormally. description: Hina is a classmate of [Yui](https://anilist.co/character/67069) and [Hachiman](https://anilist.co/character/67065), who is a quiet girl and hangs around [Yumiko](https://anilist.co/character/79593/). She is a fujoshi, which is why other boys from her class are always avoiding her.

name: Howard Link
description: Link is also a special inspector sent to Headquarters, although he appears to be more of an administrative assistant to Lvellie. He has light colored hair which is cut short in front but extends to a braid in the back. He also has two distinguishing dot markings on his forehead, but the significance of these is unknown. He is currently on assignment to keep Allen under constant surveillance, which details following him around during his everyday tasks and boarding with him. He loves cake and pie

name: Ichirou Kuga
description: __Occupation__: Mangaka Ichirou is a Shoujo Mangaka and also the Owner of a Social Apartment. name: Jack Frost
description: Jack Frost is featured in many games in the Megami Tensei franchise, and perhaps has the the most appearances of any demon in the franchise. He can be considered the mascot of Atlus and Megami Tensei as a whole, making numerous cameos as a result. name: Johnny Rayflo
description: Johnny Rayflo is a rich vampire playboy with a large mansion and several vampire maids. He was known in the past as "The Confined Elagabalus." Charles J. Chrishunds is his vassal. He acts as a food source for the devout Charley, who refuses to drink human blood. The two of them are constantly fighting, mostly due to Rayflo's perverse nature and tendency to refer to Charley as "Cherry." Johnny also has a "twin" by the name of Rayfell.

name: Kaede Johan Nouvel
description: __Height:__ 164 cm __Nationality:__ French-Japanese __Charm:__ Gungnir __Rare Skill:__ Register A prodigy who ranked number one in the high school transfer examination at Yurigaoka Jogakuin. Kaede is half-French and half-Japanese, and comes from a family who carries the bloodline of both Japanese and French nobility. name: Ken Sudou
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") Ken is apart of Class 1-D and is apart of the Basketball Club. Due to his poor academic ability, he is referred to as one of the 3 Idiots of D-Class. Regardless of this, his athletic ability is without a doubt one of the best among the school. He has a crush on Suzune after receiving help from her. Under the constant supervision of Suzune, he gradually matures and begins to improve academically rising out of the bottom ladder of class and earning her trust.
